Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace CMD with ENTRYPOINT to allow Kubernetes to override arguments while keeping the Java execution fixed.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Remove the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml as it is no longer required in modern Compose specifications.
Switch from using a pre-built image to building the service locally to support the new Java 17 environment.
Update the image tag to a specific development version for the new build context.
Change the volume mount path to match the new container structure or host directory layout.
Add an explicit command to run a specific startup script for the development environment.

k8s/deployment.yaml.general_idea: Add JWT_AUDIENCE environment variable to the Kubernetes deployment configuration.
k8s/deployment.yaml.after:
- name: JWT_AUDIENCE
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: oauth2-secrets
                  key: oauth-audience

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Security OAuth2 Authorization Server dependency for new OAuth2 features.
Add springdoc.version property to manage OpenAPI dependency version.
Update ModelMapper version to 3.2.0 for compatibility and bug fixes.
Remove explicit Jackson Databind dependency, relying on Spring Boot BOM management.
Remove explicit Swagger UI WebJar dependency, replaced by Springdoc UI.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for testing security configurations.
Update Flyway Core version to 10.7.1 for compatibility with newer database drivers and Spring Boot 3.
Remove H2 database dependency, likely switching to a different database or managed profile.
Remove maven-surefire-plugin configuration that skipped tests, enabling test execution.
Configure Spring Boot Maven Plugin to exclude Lombok from the repackaged jar.

scripts/run-dev.sh.general_idea: Migrate Spring profile activation from environment variable to JVM system property.
Explicitly bind the server to all network interfaces via JVM system property.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.general_idea: Add a new 'application' field to the UserEntity model.
Add getter and setter methods for the new 'application' field.
Reformat constructor parameter alignment for consistency.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.before: Set<UserRole> roles, LocalDateTime createdAt, LocalDateTime lastPasswordChangeAt) {
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.after: Set<UserRole> roles, LocalDateTime createdAt, LocalDateTime lastPasswordChangeAt) {

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Update Swagger API docs endpoint path from v2 to v3.
